summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of fintech SaaS dashboard. All core features working perfectly including responsive design, navigation, and UI components.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with all 4 stat cards
Recent deals display with capital stack visualization
Sidebar navigation works for all menu items
Capital Stack page loads with portfolio distribution
Capital Stack page shows deals grid (4 deals)
Deal detail navigation works (Enter Deal button)
Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu
Direct URL routing works for all routes
Mobile layout responsive with proper stacking
Desktop layout shows sidebar always visible
